title: arenaria aggregata var. frigida
intro: Arenaria aggregata var. frigida, also known as Rock Jasmine or Frigid Arenaria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Arenaria aggregata var. frigida is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
